name: Chart Industries, Inc.
description: Chart Industries, Inc. is a leading independent global manufacturer of highly engineered equipment servicing multiple applications in the Energy and Industrial Gas markets. The company's unique product portfolio is used in every phase of the liquid gas supply chain, including upfront engineering, service and repair, and end-use applications. Chart is at the forefront of the clean energy transition, providing technology, equipment, and services for liquefied natural gas (LNG), hydrogen, biogas, and carbon capture, among other applications.
